headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship
headlines.description: Delivering a major blow to President Donald Trump, the Supreme Court on Tuesday blocked his contentious attempt to limit citizenship at birth for people born on U.S. soil.

headlines.title: Rep. Tom Kean returns to Congress after four months, citing treatment for depression
After his Supreme Court loss, Trump calls on Congress to pass a law banning birthright citizenship
headlines.description: President Donald Trump brushed off a loss at the Supreme Court, which struck down one of his signature initiatives: an effort to limit birthright citizenship.

headlines.title: U.S. has U.K. ‘at its shoulder’ as it negotiates with Iran, says British ambassador
headlines.description: British Ambassador to the U.S. Christian Turner joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the upcoming NATO summit as President Trump urges European allies to contribute more to the alliance’s mutual defense. Ambassador Turner also reacts to the ongoing U.S.-Iran negotiations.

headlines.title: Congressional action to overturn 14th Amendment after Supreme Court ruling would be a ‘heavy lift’
headlines.description: The Supreme Court wraps up its term with a series of rulings including the rejection of President Trump’s executive order to end birthright citizenship and upholding state bans on transgender athletes competing on girls’ and women’s school sports teams. NBC News correspondents Shannon Pettypiece, Laura Jarrett and Lawrence Hurley join Meet the Press NOW to explain the rulings and their implications.

headlines.title: Kornacki: Colorado incumbent Rep. DeGette in ‘serious jeopardy’ as she faces far-left challenger
headlines.description: Voters in Colorado head to the polls as progressive Democrats look to make inroads. NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki and KUSA anchor and political reporter Kyle Clark preview the key matchups.

headlines.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes
headlines.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

headlines.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag
headlines.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

headlines.title: America at 250 is riven with doubt and pessimism — but with glimmers of hope
headlines.description: Americans have a bleak outlook on the nation’s future ahead of its 250th birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and a record-low number saying they are extremely proud to be Americans, according to a new NBC News poll

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.

headlines.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy
headlines.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.
